assertions.assertion: Output uses WebApplication.CreateBuilder (minimal hosting) instead of the Startup class pattern
assertions.rationale: Uses WebApplication.CreateBuilder(args) with all configuration in Program.cs, no Startup class.

assertions.assertion: Output calls builder.Services.AddIdentityServer() with Duende namespace instead of IdentityServer4
assertions.rationale: Calls builder.Services.AddIdentityServer() with Duende.IdentityServer namespaces in the using statements.

assertions.assertion: Output calls AddConfigurationStore and AddOperationalStore with UseSqlServer and MigrationsAssembly configuration
assertions.rationale: Both AddConfigurationStore and AddOperationalStore are present with UseSqlServer and MigrationsAssembly(migrationsAssembly).

assertions.assertion: Output includes UseIdentityServer() in the middleware pipeline after UseRouting() and before UseAuthorization()
assertions.rationale: Pipeline shows app.UseRouting(), then app.UseIdentityServer(), then app.UseAuthorization() in correct order.

assertions.assertion: Output removes AddDeveloperSigningCredential() or replaces it with Duende key management
assertions.rationale: Explicitly removes AddDeveloperSigningCredential with a comment explaining Duende's automatic key management replaces it.
